crates.name: terminal-protocol
crates.rationale: Leaf protocol crate that other public crates depend on.

crates.name: terminal-render-model
crates.rationale: Leaf render contract used by terminal-core embedders.

crates.name: terminal-core
crates.rationale: Core engine depends on protocol and render-model surfaces.

crates.name: terminal-fixtures
crates.rationale: Fixture harness depends on terminal-core behavior.

crates.name: terminal-pty
crates.rationale: Runtime crate packages after terminal-core because its package dry-run includes that dev dependency.

crates.name: terminal-cli
crates.rationale: CLI packages last because it depends on core, fixtures and PTY runtime crates.

notes: Publish order is derived from Hera workspace dependencies and keeps dependencies before dependents.
cargo publish is not run by M5 and remains a future maintainer action.
